subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-20
subcodes.first_line: I wrote to him [E.G. Browne], saying 'You are the first European teacher and author to have attained His Blessed Presence. Do not lose this distinction.' He did not understand me
subcodes.first_line_orig: من باو نوشتم تو اول کسی بودی از معلمین و مولفین اروپا که بساحت اقدس مشرف شدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @predictions and prophecies, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
